summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, and the hydrated evidence supports conservative keep classifications only.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR linked to a live issue, but this inventory job cannot merge or repair it and the checks/review state require maintainer handling outside this shard.
Maintainer-scope Codex behavior change should remain open for normal maintainer review, not be closed or merged by this inventory shard.
Credible session-state fix with sufficient proof, but merge and technical correctness decisions are out of scope for this plan-only inventory job.
Focused linked bug-fix PR should remain open, but failed proof and rebase/update signal block any stronger action.
Credible open fix PR tied to an open issue; keep it in the normal review path because this job cannot merge or raise fixes.
